languages.text: "В текущем состоянии каждый из объектов обречен. Но как детали умирающих механизмов можно совместить вновь, создав функционирующий, так и подопытных можно объединить в одну сущность, даровав им продолжение жизни путем верной конфигурации феррум санктум и органических компонентов всех троих. Единственное, чего мне не хватает для продолжения эксперимента — разрешения дилеммы: кого поместить в основу?" {n}Эоганн переводит на вас горящий взгляд.{/n}

"In their current state, each of the subjects is doomed. But just as the parts of dying mechanisms can be combined again to create a functioning machine, so too can these subjects be combined into a single entity, granting them continued life through the correct configuration of the Ferrum Sanctum and organic components of all three. The only thing I require to continue the experiment is a solution to my dilemma: which subject should serve as the basis?" {n}Eogunn turns his burning gaze to you.{/n}
languages.original_text: "В текущем состоянии каждый из объектов обречен. Но как детали умирающих механизмов можно совместить вновь, создав функционирующий, так и подопытных можно объединить в одну сущность, даровав им продолжение жизни путем верной конфигурации феррум санктум и органических компонентов всех троих. Единственное, чего мне не хватает для продолжения эксперимента — разрешения дилеммы: кого поместить в основу?" {n}Эоганн переводит на вас горящий взгляд.{/n}

But just as the parts of dying mechanisms can be combined again to create a functioning machine, so too can these subjects be combined into a single entity, granting them continued life through the correct configuration of the ferrum sanctum and organic components of all three. The only thing I require to continue the experiment is a solution to my dilemma: which subject should serve as the basis?" {n}Eogunn turns his burning gaze to you.{/n}

"In their current state, each of the subjects is doomed. But just as the parts of dying mechanisms can be combined again to create a functioning machine, so too can these subjects be combined into a single entity, granting them continued life through the correct configuration of the ferrum sanctum and organic components of all three. The only thing I require to continue the experiment is a solution to my dilemma: which subject should serve as the basis?" {n}Eogunn turns his burning gaze to you.{/n}

languages.text: 「現在の状態では、いずれの被験者も死を免れることはできない。しかし、死のメカニズムの部品を組み合わせて機能する機械を作り出すのと同じように、これらの被験者を組み合わせて一つの存在にすることで、聖鉄と有機成分の正しい構成によって彼らに永遠の命を与えることができる。実験を続けるために必要なのは、私のジレンマの解決だけだ。どの被験者を基盤にするべきか？」{n}エオガンは燃えるような視線をあなたに向ける。{/n}
languages.original_text: "In their current state, each of the subjects is doomed. But just as the parts of dying mechanisms can be combined again to create a functioning machine, so too can these subjects be combined into a single entity, granting them continued life through the correct configuration of the ferrum sanctum and organic components of all three. The only thing I require to continue the experiment is a solution to my dilemma: which subject should serve as the basis?" {n}Eogunn turns his burning gaze to you.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 「現在の状態では、いずれの被験者も死を免れることはできない。しかし、死のメカニズムの部品を組み合わせて機能する機械を作り出すのと同じように、これらの被験者を組み合わせて一つの存在にすることで、聖鉄と有機成分の正しい構成によって彼らに永遠の命を与えることができる。実験を続けるために必要なのは、私のジレンマの解決だけだ。どの被験者を基盤にするべきか？」{n}エオグンは燃えるような視線をあなたに向ける。{/n}

languages.text: “就现在的状况来看，每个实验体都必死无疑。但正如垂死机械的部件能够重组为一台运转的机器，这些实验体亦可融合为一个实体。正确配置这三人的钢铁圣所与有机组件，便能延续他们的生命。要继续实验，我只需要再解决一个困境：应当以哪个实验体作为基体？”{n}伊奥贡扭头看向你，目光炽热。{/n}
languages.original_text: "In their current state, each of the subjects is doomed. But just as the parts of dying mechanisms can be combined again to create a functioning machine, so too can these subjects be combined into a single entity, granting them continued life through the correct configuration of the Ferrum Sanctum and organic components of all three. The only thing I require to continue the experiment is a solution to my dilemma: which subject should serve as the basis?" {n}Eogunn turns his burning gaze to you.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “就现在的状况来看，每个实验体都必死无疑。但正如垂死机械的部件能够重组为一台运转的机器，这些实验体亦可融合为一个实体。正确配置这三人的钢铁圣所与有机组件，便能延续他们的生命。要继续实验，我只需要再解决一个困境：应当以哪个实验体作为基体？”{n}伊奥贡扭头看向你，目光炽热。{/n}

languages.text: «En su estado actual, todos los sujetos están condenados. Pero, al igual que partes de los mecanismos moribundos pueden combinarse en una máquina funcional, estos sujetos también pueden unirse en una sola entidad para obtener la continuidad de la vida con la configuración correcta de Ferrum Sanctum y componentes orgánicos de los tres hombres. Lo único que necesito para continuar el experimento es una solución a mi dilema: ¿qué sujeto debería ser la base?». {n}Eogunn fija su mirada ardiente sobre ti.{/n}
languages.original_text: "In their current state, each of the subjects is doomed. But just as the parts of dying mechanisms can be combined again to create a functioning machine, so too can these subjects be combined into a single entity, granting them continued life through the correct configuration of the Ferrum Sanctum and organic components of all three. The only thing I require to continue the experiment is a solution to my dilemma: which subject should serve as the basis?" {n}Eogunn turns his burning gaze to you.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «En su estado actual, todos los sujetos están condenados. Pero, al igual que partes de los mecanismos moribundos pueden combinarse en una máquina funcional, estos sujetos también pueden unirse en una sola entidad para obtener la continuidad de la vida con la configuración correcta de Ferrum Sanctum y componentes orgánicos de los tres hombres. Lo único que necesito para continuar el experimento es una solución a mi dilema: ¿qué sujeto debería ser la base?». {n}Eogunn fija su mirada ardiente sobre ti.{/n}

languages.text: "In ihrem derzeitigen Zustand sind alle Subjekte dem Untergang geweiht. Aber genau wie die Teile eines sterbenden Mechanismus wieder zu einer funktionierenden Maschine kombiniert werden können, können diese Subjekte eine einzelne Wesenheit bilden und durch die korrekte Konfiguration des Ferrum sanctum oder ihrer organischen Komponenten weiterleben. Für die Fortsetzung des Experimentes brauche ich lediglich eine Lösung für mein Dilemma: welches Subjekt sollte als Basis dienen?" {n}Eogunn richtet seinen fiebrigen Blick auf dich.{/n}
languages.original_text: "In their current state, each of the subjects is doomed. But just as the parts of dying mechanisms can be combined again to create a functioning machine, so too can these subjects be combined into a single entity, granting them continued life through the correct configuration of the Ferrum Sanctum and organic components of all three. The only thing I require to continue the experiment is a solution to my dilemma: which subject should serve as the basis?" {n}Eogunn turns his burning gaze to you.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "In ihrem derzeitigen Zustand sind alle Subjekte dem Untergang geweiht. Aber genau wie die Teile eines sterbenden Mechanismus wieder zu einer funktionierenden Maschine kombiniert werden können, können diese Subjekte eine einzelne Wesenheit bilden und durch die korrekte Konfiguration des Ferrum sanctum oder ihrer organischen Komponenten weiterleben. Für die Fortsetzung des Experimentes brauche ich lediglich eine Lösung für mein Dilemma: welches Subjekt sollte als Basis dienen?" {n}Eogunn richtet seinen fiebrigen Blick auf dich.{/n}

languages.text: « Dans leur état actuel, ces sujets sont tous condamnés. Cependant, à l'instar des pièces d'un mécanisme mourant qui peuvent être recombinées afin de fabriquer une machine fonctionnelle, il est possible d'utiliser ces sujets pour créer une entité unique. En configurant correctement le Ferrum Sanctum et des composants organiques provenant d'eux trois, nous pourrons leur permettre de continuer à vivre sous cette nouvelle forme. La seule chose dont j'ai besoin pour poursuivre l'expérience est une solution à mon dilemme : quel sujet choisir pour servir de base ? » {n}demande Eogunn en posant son regard ardent sur vous.{/n}
languages.original_text: "In their current state, each of the subjects is doomed. But just as the parts of dying mechanisms can be combined again to create a functioning machine, so too can these subjects be combined into a single entity, granting them continued life through the correct configuration of the Ferrum Sanctum and organic components of all three. The only thing I require to continue the experiment is a solution to my dilemma: which subject should serve as the basis?" {n}Eogunn turns his burning gaze to you.{/n}

La seule chose dont j'ai besoin pour poursuivre l'expérience est une solution à mon dilemme : quel sujet choisir pour servir de base ? » {n}demande Eogunn en posant son regard ardent sur vous.{/n}

languages.text: "Mevcut durumlarında deneklerin her biri ölüme mahkûm. Ancak tıpkı ölmekte olan mekanizmaların parçalarının çalışan bir makine yaratmak için yeniden birleştirilebilmesi gibi bu denekler de her üçünün organik bileşenleri ile demir kutağın doğru konfigürasyonu aracılığıyla onlara süreğen bir yaşam bahşeden tek bir varlıkta birleştirilebilir. Deneye devam etmek için ihtiyacım olan tek gereken, ikilemimi çözmek. Hangi denek temel olarak kullanılmalı?" {n}Eogunn, yanıcı bakışlarını size çeviriyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "In their current state, each of the subjects is doomed. But just as the parts of dying mechanisms can be combined again to create a functioning machine, so too can these subjects be combined into a single entity, granting them continued life through the correct configuration of the Ferrum Sanctum and organic components of all three. The only thing I require to continue the experiment is a solution to my dilemma: which subject should serve as the basis?" {n}Eogunn turns his burning gaze to you.{/n}
